parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_stage_audit_log (entity_type, entity_id, action, old_value, new_value, source, created_at) VALUES ('sync', $1, $2, '', $3, $4, NOW())

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'synced', direction: $json.direction || 'none', fields: $json.fields_synced || [], timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
